headline: SAMHI Hotels to acquire majority stake in RARE India and signs Marriott MoU
summary: RARE India’s offerings include heritage palaces, retreats, wildlife lodges, and boutique accommodations managed by independent owners.

headline: Seven Hills Realty Trust Invests $37.0 Million in Two New First Mortgage Loans
summary: NEWTON, Mass., March 09, 2026--Seven Hills Realty Trust (Nasdaq: SEVN) today announced the closing of two new first mortgage loan investments totaling $37.0 million, as follows:
